title: bucket.config Facet
description: Object-storage bucket METADATA, projected by the awss3 Syncer (ADR-0097; §1.1). Metadata ONLY — never object contents (§1.2). versioning is optional (a non-reporting backend omits it rather than emitting a false value). Closed schema matching normalizeBucket.

versioning.description: versioning status (e.g. Enabled, Suspended); omitted when the backend does not report it
